div.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%

div.p: The official URL for this implementation guide is:

description.value: WHO Immunization Implementaiton Guide

valueMarkdown.value: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology

name.value: ConceptMap to and from IMMZ.C DataElements

description.value: Mapping to and from IMMZ.C Data Dictionary to other codesystems.

name.value: ConceptMap to and from IMMZ.D DataElements

description.value: Mapping to and from IMMZ.D Data Dictionary to other codesystems.

name.value: ConceptMap to and from IMMZ.Z DataElements

description.value: Mapping to and from IMMZ.Z Data Dictionary to other codesystems.
The service delivery location (location name, city, municipality, town or village) where the vaccine administration occurred
The service delivery country where the vaccine administration occurred

name.value: Immunization Due Date of Next Dose

description.value: The service delivery location (location name, city, municipality, town or village) where the vaccine administration occurred
Uses a living but weakened version of the virus or one that is very similar
Name of the market authorization holder of the vaccine received. If market authorization holder is unknown, vaccine manufacturer is REQUIRED
The type of dose in a series that the client received
The brand or trade name used to refer to the vaccine received
CodeSystem for IMMZ.C Data Elements
ValueSet for Sex for IMMZ.C.DE5
Data elements for the IMMZ.C4.Create client record Data Dictionary Activity. Identical to IMMZ.C5.3.Update client details.

Data elements for the IMMZ.D1.Capture or update client history Data Dictionary Activity.
Questionnaire for IMMZ.D1.Capture or update client history

Questionnaire for IMMZ.D13.Update client record

Data elements for the IMMZ.D2.Determine required vaccination(s) Data Dictionary Activity.
Questionnaire for IMMZ.D2.Determine required vaccination(s)
Provide immunization communication

Countries with ongoing transmission in which the risk of measles mortality remains high (countries that provide first dose of measles-containing vaccine (MCV) at 9 months and second dose of MCV at 15 months)
Countries with low levels of measles transmission (countries that provide first dose of measles-containing vaccine (MCV) at 12 months and second dose of MCV at 15 months)
Measles-containing vaccine dose 0 (MCV0) administration
Provide measles immunization
Measles-containing vaccine (MCV) supplementary dose administration

This library defines common terminologies and functions used throughout the Immunization CPG
This library defines concepts used throughout the Immunization CPG
This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D2.DT.Measles.MCV dose 0 decision table in the Immunization CPG
This library defines context-independent elements for Measles used throughout the Immunization CPG
This library defines encounter-based elements for Measles used throughout the Immunization CPG
This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D2.DT.Measles.Low transmission decision table in the Immunization CPG
This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D2.DT.Measles.Ongoing transmission decision table in the Immunization CPG
This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D2.DT.Measles.Supplementary dose decision table in the Immunization CPG
This library defines context-independent elements used throughout the Immunization CPG
This library defines encounter-based elements used throughout the Immunization CPG
Caregiver (RelatedPerson) Profile for the Immunizations SMART Guidelines. From IMMZ.C Client Registration for IMMZ.C4.Create client record OR IMMZ.C5.3.Update client details.
Immunization Profile for the Immunizations SMART Guidelines. From IMMZ.D Administer Vaccine
Observation Profile for the Immunizations SMART Guidelines. From IMMZ.D Administer Vaccine
Patient Profile for the Immunizations SMART Guidelines. From IMMZ.C Client Registration for IMMZ.C4.Create client record OR IMMZ.C5.3.Update client details.
This library defines common terminologies and functions used throughout WHO SMART Guidelines content
This library defines common concepts used throughout WHO SMART Guidelines content
This library defines context-independent elements used throughout WHO SMART Guidelines content
This library defines encounter-based elements used throughout WHO SMART Guidelines content
